provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality.name: provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality
provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality.description: The person provides proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

is_union_citizen.name: is_union_citizen
is_union_citizen.description: The person is a citizen of the Union.

falls_under_eu_free_movement_law.name: falls_under_eu_free_movement_law
falls_under_eu_free_movement_law.description: The person falls under Union law on free movement of persons.

present_on_territory.name: present_on_territory
present_on_territory.description: The person is present on the territory.

does_not_meet_entry_or_stay_conditions.name: does_not_meet_entry_or_stay_conditions
does_not_meet_entry_or_stay_conditions.description: The person does not or no longer meets the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

subject_to_removal_procedure.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

subject_to_international_protection_proc.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
subject_to_international_protection_proc.description: The person is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

subject_to_responsible_member_state_proc.name: subject_to_responsible_member_state_procedure
subject_to_responsible_member_state_proc.description: The person is subject to a procedure determining or transferring to the member state responsible for examining an international protection request.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination of the person's circumstances has been performed.

risk_is_actual_and_real.name: risk_is_actual_and_real
risk_is_actual_and_real.description: The assessed risk concerning the person is current and real.

no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.description: The person did not file a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal stay.

international_protection_request_not_wit.name: international_protection_request_not_within_deadline
international_protection_request_not_wit.description: The person did not make an international protection request within the legally provided deadline.

used_false_or_fraudulent_means_in_releva.name: used_false_or_fraudulent_means_in_relevant_procedure
used_false_or_fraudulent_means_in_releva.description: The person used false or misleading information, false or forged documents, fraud, or other unlawful means in a procedure for international protection, stay, removal, or refusal of entry.

failed_to_cooperate_with_immigration_aut.name: failed_to_cooperate_with_immigration_authorities
failed_to_cooperate_with_immigration_aut.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for immigration entry, stay, establishment, or removal rules.

unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_trans.name: unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_transfer_refusal_or_removal_measure
unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_trans.description: The person indicated unwillingness or failed to comply with a transfer, refusal-of-entry, or removal measure.

unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_activ.name: unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_active_entry_ban
unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_activ.description: The person indicated unwillingness or failed to comply with an entry ban that has not been lifted or suspended.

unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_less_.name: unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_less_.description: The person indicated unwillingness or failed to comply with a less coercive measure intended to secure transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_publi.name: unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_public_order_restriction_measure
unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_publi.description: The person indicated unwillingness or failed to comply with a freedom-restricting measure intended to safeguard public order or national security.

unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_equiv.name: unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_other_member_state_measure
unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_equiv.description: The person indicated unwillingness or failed to comply with an equivalent measure taken by another member state.

active_entry_ban_in_kingdom_or_member_st.name: active_entry_ban_in_kingdom_or_member_state
active_entry_ban_in_kingdom_or_member_st.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom or another member state that has not been lifted or suspended.

submitted_new_application_immediately_af.name: submitted_new_application_immediately_after_negative_or_removal_decision
submitted_new_application_immediately_af.description: The person submitted a new residence application or international protection request immediately after a refusal, termination of stay, refusal-of-entry, or removal decision.

concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_s.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_state
concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_s.description: When questioned, the person concealed having previously given fingerprints in another state bound by rules determining responsibility for international protection requests.

multiple_applications_with_negative_or_n.name: multiple_applications_with_negative_or_no_residence_title
multiple_applications_with_negative_or_n.description: The person filed multiple international protection requests or residence applications in the Kingdom or other member states that led to negative decisions or no residence title.

concealed_prior_international_protection.name: concealed_prior_international_protection_request_in_dublin_state
concealed_prior_international_protection.description: When questioned, the person concealed a previous international protection request in another state bound by rules determining responsibility for such requests.

came_for_purposes_other_than_application.name: came_for_purposes_other_than_application_purposes
came_for_purposes_other_than_application.description: The person stated or the file shows that the person came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those of the submitted international protection request or residence application.

fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal.name: fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal.description: The person is subject to a fine for lodging a manifestly unlawful appeal with the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

has_valid_travel_document.name: has_valid_travel_document
has_valid_travel_document.description: The person possesses a valid travel document.

has_valid_passport.name: has_valid_passport
has_valid_passport.description: The person possesses a valid passport.

has_valid_identity_document.name: has_valid_identity_document
has_valid_identity_document.description: The person possesses a valid identity document.

recognized_by_national_authority_willing.name: recognized_by_national_authority_willing_to_issue_pass
recognized_by_national_authority_willing.description: The person's national authority recognized the person as a national and declared willingness to issue a laissez-passer.

nationality_category_allows_minister_pas.name: nationality_category_allows_minister_pass
nationality_category_allows_minister_pas.description: The person belongs to a nationality category for which the minister may issue a laissez-passer.

subject_to_relevant_absconding_procedure.name: subject_to_relevant_absconding_procedure
subject_to_relevant_absconding_procedure.description: The person is subject to one of the procedures relevant for assessing risk of absconding.

absconding_criterion_no_application_or_l.name: absconding_criterion_no_application_or_late_request_met
absconding_criterion_no_application_or_l.description: The absconding-risk criterion concerning no residence application after illegal entry or stay, or a late international protection request, is met.

absconding_criterion_measure_noncomplian.name: absconding_criterion_measure_noncompliance_met
absconding_criterion_measure_noncomplian.description: The absconding-risk criterion concerning unwillingness or failure to comply with listed measures is met.

at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.description: At least one statutory objective criterion for risk of absconding is met for the person.

is_foreigner.name: is_foreigner
is_foreigner.description: The person is legally classified as a foreigner.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is legally classified as a third-country national.

has_illegal_stay.name: has_illegal_stay
has_illegal_stay.description: The person is legally considered to be in illegal stay.

risk_of_absconding.name: risk_of_absconding
risk_of_absconding.description: The person is legally considered to present a risk of absconding.

is_identified_foreigner.name: is_identified_foreigner
is_identified_foreigner.description: The person is legally classified as an identified foreigner.
